data.name: Hentai Clicker: Sunny is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Sunny is streaming

Step onto the sun-soaked sands of California, where Sunny, your insanely hot and teasing lifeguard, is live and ready to “save” you… in the dirtiest ways possible. Every click makes her flirt harder, pose hotter, and show off more as the heat rises under the beach sun.

She’s not here to blow a whistle.
She’s here to make you lose control. 🏖️🔥

🍑 About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Sunny is streaming mixes addictive clicker gameplay with a spicy beach fantasy full of teasing, heat, and nonstop temptation.
Tap to collect hearts, unlock new stages, and push Sunny’s reactions further as she goes from confident lifeguard queen to shameless beach goddess.

Earn hearts to unlock sexy lifeguard outfits, steamy animations, and playful voice lines that get hotter as you progress. Upgrade your skills, boost your heart income, and dive deeper into Sunny’s wild summer secrets.

🎉 Features

🌴 California Beach Fantasy – Sun, sand, and a lifeguard who loves attention.
🎨 Bold Anime Visuals – Vibrant art with a hot summer vibe.
🖱️ Addictive Clicker Gameplay – Easy to play, impossible to stop.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From classic red lifeguard gear to daring beachwear.
🔊 Voice Acting & Teasing – Flirty lines, giggles, and naughty reactions.
🚀 Upgrades & Progression – Stack hearts faster and unlock new surprises.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If you’re into summer heat, playful teasing, and a girl who knows exactly how to drive you crazy… Sunny is your perfect beach obsession.
She’s confident, cocky, and always in control—until your clicks make her beg for more. 😈🔥

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Every tap makes Sunny hotter and more playful.
🔓 Unlock Scenes & Outfits – Spend hearts to reveal new looks and moments.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Boost speed, increase rewards, and reach new stages faster.

🎉 Start Your Beach Madness Now!

The sun is out… and Sunny is live. 🌞💋
Jump into Hentai Clicker: Sunny is streaming and let the summer get wild.

data.short_description: 🏖️🔥 Step into a hot beach fantasy with Hentai Clicker: Sunny is streaming! Click to collect ❤️, unlock sexy lifeguard outfits, and upgrade your skills in this addictive anime clicker. Flirty voice lines, steamy progression, and nonstop summer teasing 😈🌴
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 M370X
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
